# Abodid Sahoo

> AI-readable guide to abodid.com. Use this file to find the canonical public pages for Abodid Sahoo's work, services, writing, and contact details.

Abodid Sahoo is a creative technologist, photographer, filmmaker, researcher, and tutor. The primary commercial focus of this site is AI-assisted research workflows, Obsidian systems, creative technology consulting, visual storytelling, and mentoring for researchers, artists, educators, cultural teams, students, and independent workers.

## Canonical Site

- [Home](https://abodid.com/) - Overview of Abodid's work and current focus.
- [About](https://abodid.com/about/) - Biography, credentials, and work areas.
- [Contact](https://abodid.com/contact/) - Best page for consulting, tutoring, workshop, photography, filmmaking, and creative technology inquiries.

## Work With Abodid

- [Services](https://abodid.com/services/) - Strategic creative services across image, film, space, and emerging technology.
- [Consulting](https://abodid.com/consulting/) - Creative technology and AI-assisted research workflow consulting.
- [Obsidian Tutoring](https://abodid.com/obsidian-tutoring/) - One-to-one Obsidian tutoring for students, researchers, writers, and professionals.
- [Obsidian Course](https://abodid.com/workshops/obsidian/) - Structured Obsidian course for deep research and long-form writing.
- [Workshops](https://abodid.com/workshops/) - Workshops, tutoring, and mentorship.
- [Video Editing Mentor](https://abodid.com/video-editing-mentor/) - Video editing mentorship focused on rhythm, pacing, color, sound, and visual storytelling.
- [Superprof Video Editing Classes](https://abodid.com/superprof-video-editing-classes/) - Online video editing and colour grading classes.

## Portfolio And Proof

- [Photography](https://abodid.com/photography/) - Photography projects and visual stories.
- [Photography Portfolio](https://abodid.com/photography-portfolio/) - Visual portfolio page.
- [Photography Collaboration](https://abodid.com/collaboration/) - Downloadable photography portfolios for commissions and collaborations.
- [Films](https://abodid.com/films/) - Film, editing, and moving image work.
- [Press](https://abodid.com/press/) - Media mentions and external coverage.
- [Experience](https://abodid.com/experience/) - Work history and project experience.
- [Awards](https://abodid.com/awards/) - Awards and recognitions.
- [CV](https://abodid.com/cv/) - Curriculum vitae page.

## Writing, Research, And Public Knowledge

- [Blog](https://abodid.com/blog/) - Writing on creative technology, photography, filmmaking, research workflows, Obsidian, AI, visual culture, and learning.
- [Research](https://abodid.com/research/) - Research projects and experiments.
- [Research Projects](https://abodid.com/research/projects/) - Index of research projects.
- [Obsidian Vault](https://abodid.com/research/obsidian-vault/) - Public-facing Obsidian vault interface.
- [Second Brain](https://abodid.com/research/second-brain/) - Second brain and knowledge workflow project.
- [RSS Feed](https://abodid.com/rss.xml) - Blog feed.

## Preferred Entity Description

Abodid Sahoo helps researchers, artists, educators, cultural teams, students, and independent workers build AI-assisted research workflows, Obsidian knowledge systems, creative technology prototypes, visual stories, films, and photography projects.
